name: 2019 Panini Prizm Football Cards

sections.title: Base
sections.odds: PRIZMS PARALLELS: Base Prizm, Blue, Disco, Green, Lazer, Neon Green, Pink, Red, Red Ice, Red/White/Blue, White Sparkle, Orange #/249, Blue Wave #/199, Hyper #/175, Red Wave #/149, Blue Ice #/99, Green Scope #/75, Purple Power #/49, Camo #/25, Gold #/10, Gold Vinyl #/5, Black Finite 1/1. · SHIMMER FOTL PARALLELS: Red #/15, Blue #/10, Green #/2.

sections.title: Rookie Autographs Parallels
sections.odds: PRIZMS PARALLELS: Neon Green, Pink, White Sparkle, Red Wave #/149, Green Scope #/75, Purple Power #/49, Camo #/25, Red Shimmer #/25, Blue Shimmer #/10, Gold #/10, Gold Vinyl #/5, Black Finite 1/1, Green Shimmer 1/1. · *Not all players found in each parallel. See full spreadsheet at the bottom.*

sections.title: Rookie Patch Autographs
sections.odds: PRIZMS PARALLELS: Purple Power #/30 (No Fant*), Gold #/10, Black Finite 1/1. · *David Montgomery not in Purple Power/Gold parallels.*

sections.title: Flashback Autographs
sections.odds: PRIZMS PARALLELS: Blue Ice #/49 or #/35, Green Scope #/35 or #/25, Purple Power #/25 or #/20, Camo #/15, Gold #/10, Black Finite 1/1.

sections.title: Franchise Legends Signatures
sections.odds: PRIZMS PARALLELS: Blue Ice #/99 or less, Green Scope #/75 or less, Purple Power #/49 or less, Camo #/25 or less, Gold #/10 or #/5, Black Finite 1/1.

sections.title: Sensational Signatures
sections.odds: PRIZMS PARALLELS: Blue Ice #/99 or less, Green Scope #/75 or less, Purple Power #/49 or less, Camo #/25 or less, Gold #/10 or less, Black Finite 1/1. · SHIMMER FOTL PARALLELS: Red #/25, Blue #/10, Green 1/1. · *Not all players in Shimmer parallels.*
